what: Multidimensional Canonical Tocky Analysis of Temporal and Developmental Structure in Single-Cell Transcriptomes
title: Multidimensional Canonical Tocky Analysis of Temporal and Developmental Structure in Single-Cell Transcriptomes
text: Author: Dr Masahiro OnoDate: 16 March 2026

title: Multidimensional Canonical Tocky Analysis of Temporal and Developmental Structure in Single-Cell Transcriptomes
text: mCanonicalTockySeq R package analysing single-cell transcriptomes systems temporal progression developmental progression occur simultaneously. package developed around Nr4a3-Tocky system, Fluorescent Timer reporter provides experimentally anchored readout strong T-cell receptor (TCR) signalling history. generally, framework constructs shared canonical space constrained biologically defined landmark populations, extracts temporal developmental structure using experimentally anchored biological readouts. Rather assuming time development orthogonal latent variables, mCanonicalTockySeq represents jointly biologically informed canonical geometry.

title: Multidimensional Canonical Tocky Analysis of Temporal and Developmental Structure in Single-Cell Transcriptomes
text: Example interactive visualisations Nr4a3-Tocky temporal development thymus available : GitHub Pages:https://MonoTockyLab.github.io/Nr4a3-Tocky-3D-Models/  Nr4a3-Tocky thymocyte setting, mCanonicalTockySeq enables: reconstruction Tocky-defined temporal progression simultaneous quantification developmental progression toward CD4 CD8 states identification gene-associated developmental trajectories across Tocky Time projection new datasets, including cross-species ortholog-translated data, experimentally anchored reference space

title: Multidimensional Canonical Tocky Analysis of Temporal and Developmental Structure in Single-Cell Transcriptomes
text: Masahiro Ono Lab (MonoTockyLab) develops experimental computational approaches study immune cell dynamics, particular focus temporal regulation gene expression T cells. lab known development Tocky (Timer Cell Kinetics Activity), platform uses Fluorescent Timer proteins analyse transcriptional signalling dynamics vivo single-cell resolution. research integrates mouse genetics, immunology, flow cytometry, single-cell omics, computational modelling. Current research directions include: cancer immunology immunotherapy temporal mechanisms T-cell activation, differentiation, tolerance Foxp3 transcriptional dynamics regulation vivo computational methods time-resolved single-cell analysis, including CanonicalTockySeq Principal Investigator: Dr Masahiro Ono Dr Ono creator Tocky, spanning transgenic reporter systems associated analytical frameworks.

what: Launch Interactive 3D Fate Explorer App — LaunchTocky3DApp
title: Launch Interactive 3D Fate Explorer App — LaunchTocky3DApp
text: Launches local Shiny web application explore 3D Tocky trajectory. Utilizes dynamically anchored overlapping multi-identity tubes mExtractTrajectoryTubes().

title: Launch Interactive 3D Fate Explorer App — LaunchTocky3DApp
code: LaunchTocky3DApp(   object,   seurat_obj,   window_size = 10,   step_size = 1,   span = 0.4 )

title: Launch Interactive 3D Fate Explorer App — LaunchTocky3DApp
text: object mCanonicalTockyObj. seurat_obj Original Seurat object fetch gene expression . window_size Numeric. Width sliding angle slice (default 10). step_size Numeric. Step size sliding window (default 1). span Numeric. LOESS smoothing span (default 0.4).

text: S4 Class hold mCanonicalTockySeq Results

title: S4 Class to hold mCanonicalTockySeq Results — mCanonicalTockyObj-class
text: X Matrix. single-cell expression matrix (Genes x Cells), accepts either dense sparse matrices. Z matrix. reference landmark matrix (Genes x Vectors). metadata data.frame. Cell-level metadata. genes character. features used RDA. expression_scores data.frame. Gene loadings. fitted_cell_scores data.frame. Fitted cell scores. cell_scores data.frame. Projected cell scores. biplot data.frame. Constraint vectors. marker_info list. Provenance landmarks. TockyData data.frame. Gradient mapping lineage trajectory results.

title: Canonical Redundancy Analysis for Tocky Differentiation — mCanonicalTockySeq
text: Canonical Redundancy Analysis Tocky Differentiation

title: Canonical Redundancy Analysis for Tocky Differentiation — mCanonicalTockySeq
code: mCanonicalTockySeq(   object,   temporal_col,   b_ident = "B",   br_ident = "BR",   r_ident = "R",   lineage_col,   lineage_idents,   lineage_names = NULL,   top_n = 100,   custom_genes = NULL,   layer = "data",   scale_Z = TRUE )

title: Canonical Redundancy Analysis for Tocky Differentiation — mCanonicalTockySeq
text: object Seurat object. temporal_col Character. Metadata column temporal anchors. b_ident Character. Identity Blue (New) landmark (default "B"). br_ident Character. Identity Blue-Red (Persistent) landmark (default "BR"). r_ident Character. Identity Red (Arrested) landmark (default "R"). lineage_col Character. Metadata column lineage endpoints. lineage_idents Character vector identities Seurat object lineage endpoints. lineage_names Optional character vector. Biological names lineages (e.g., c("CD4", "CD8")). top_n Integer. Number marker genes extract per group (default 100). custom_genes Optional character vector skip marker calculation. layer Character. Seurat layer use (default "data"). scale_Z Logical. Whether scale Z matrix (default TRUE).

title: Canonical Redundancy Analysis for Tocky Differentiation — mCanonicalTockySeq
text: object class mCanonicalTockyObj.

what: Extract Independent Biological Trajectory Tubes — mExtractTrajectoryTubes
title: Extract Independent Biological Trajectory Tubes — mExtractTrajectoryTubes
text: Models independent developmental trajectories arbitrary number genes. gene, isolates "Core" expressing cells calculate expression-weighted barycenter covariance matrix, bypassing gravitational pull ambient RNA noise. draws perfect geometric ellipse using Chi-Square distribution. Cells falling within confidence interval gene's trajectory marked TRUE specific tube, allowing overlapping dual identities.

title: Extract Independent Biological Trajectory Tubes — mExtractTrajectoryTubes
code: mExtractTrajectoryTubes(object, ...)  # S4 method for class 'mCanonicalTockyObj' mExtractTrajectoryTubes(   object,   seurat_obj,   features,   ci = 0.9,   window_size = 10,   span = 0.4,   reset = TRUE )

title: Extract Independent Biological Trajectory Tubes — mExtractTrajectoryTubes
text: object mCanonicalTockyObj. ... Additional arguments passed methods. seurat_obj Original Seurat object. features Character vector genes model trajectories (e.g., c("Cd4", "Cd8a")). ci Numeric. Confidence interval ellipses (default 0.90). window_size Numeric. Width sliding angle slice (default 10). span Numeric. LOESS smoothing span barycenters (default 0.4). reset Logical. TRUE (default), deletes previously created lineage tubes. FALSE, appends new tubes updates composite Lineage_Identity.

title: Calculate Fate Commitment Scores — mGetFateScores
text: Calculates dot product projection cells towards lineage endpoints. Automatically detects lineage destinations established mCanonicalTockySeq().

title: Calculate Fate Commitment Scores — mGetFateScores
code: mGetFateScores(object, ...)  # S4 method for class 'mCanonicalTockyObj' mGetFateScores(object)

title: Gradient Tocky Sequence (Slerp Model) — mGradientTockySeq
text: Projects cells onto piecewise Slerp manifold defined landmarks B -> BR -> R. Automatically extracts landmark vectors provided mCanonicalTockyObj. Cells negative correlations three landmarks classified "Timer Negative" (NA), lie ordination space opposite Tocky trajectory.

title: Gradient Tocky Sequence (Slerp Model) — mGradientTockySeq
code: mGradientTockySeq(object, ...)  # S4 method for class 'mCanonicalTockyObj' mGradientTockySeq(object, filter_negative = TRUE, intensity_q = 0.75)

title: Gradient Tocky Sequence (Slerp Model) — mGradientTockySeq
text: object object class mCanonicalTockyObj. ... Additional arguments. filter_negative Logical. TRUE, assigns NA cells negative projection three landmarks. intensity_q Numeric. Quantile threshold (0 1) normalized intensity. Cells falling threshold treated non-participating assigned NA angle. Default 0.75.

title: Gradient Tocky Sequence (Slerp Model) — mGradientTockySeq
text: updated mCanonicalTockyObj Slerp mapping results stored @TockyData slot.

what: Plot Canonical Tocky Ordination with Continuous Gradient Legend — mPlotCanonicalTocky
title: Plot Canonical Tocky Ordination with Continuous Gradient Legend — mPlotCanonicalTocky
text: Visually evaluates constrained ordination space. Automatically detects number available RDA axes generates multi-panel layout showing sequential axis pairs (1v2, 2v3, 3v4, etc.) followed continuous Tocky Time legend.

title: Plot Canonical Tocky Ordination with Continuous Gradient Legend — mPlotCanonicalTocky
code: mPlotCanonicalTocky(object, ...)  # S4 method for class 'mCanonicalTockyObj' mPlotCanonicalTocky(object, alpha_level = 0.2)

title: Plot Canonical Tocky Ordination with Continuous Gradient Legend — mPlotCanonicalTocky
text: object mCanonicalTockyObj. ... Additional arguments passed methods. alpha_level Numeric transparency level cells (0-1). Default 0.2.

what: Plot Gene Expression Dynamics by Group — mPlotGeneDynamics
title: Plot Gene Expression Dynamics by Group — mPlotGeneDynamics
text: Visualizes single-cell gene expression trends along Tocky Time axis. Accepts multiple genes automatically generates grid layout. Automatically detects Lineage_Bias mCanonicalTockyObj.

title: Plot Gene Expression Dynamics by Group — mPlotGeneDynamics
code: mPlotGeneDynamics(object, seurat_obj, features, ...)  # S4 method for class 'mCanonicalTockyObj' mPlotGeneDynamics(   object,   seurat_obj,   features,   group_by = "Lineage_Bias",   span = 0.8,   jitter_amount = 0.2,   pt_alpha = 0.2,   m = 1.15,   ncol = 2 )

title: Plot Gene Expression Dynamics by Group — mPlotGeneDynamics
text: object mCanonicalTockyObj. seurat_obj Original Seurat object. features Character vector genes plot. ... Additional arguments passed methods. group_by Optional metadata column Seurat TockyData color . Defaults "Lineage_Bias". span Numeric. Smoothing span LOESS (default 0.8). jitter_amount Numeric. Amount vertical jitter applied expression values reduce overplotting (default 0.2). pt_alpha Numeric. Transparency level plotted cells, ranging 0 (transparent) 1 (opaque) (default 0.2). m Numeric. Multiplier maximum y-axis limit ensure curves data points fit comfortably within plot (default 1.15). ncol Integer. Number columns plot grid (default 2).

title: Plot Tocky-Time Heatmap — mPlotTockyHeatmap
text: Generates binned smoothed heatmap ordered Tocky Time.

title: Plot Tocky-Time Heatmap — mPlotTockyHeatmap
code: mPlotTockyHeatmap(object, seurat_obj, genes, ...)  # S4 method for class 'mCanonicalTockyObj' mPlotTockyHeatmap(   object,   seurat_obj,   genes,   n_bins = 100,   ordering_method = c("peak", "cluster"),   span = 0.5,   scale_rows = TRUE )

title: Plot Tocky-Time Heatmap — mPlotTockyHeatmap
text: object mCanonicalTockyObj. seurat_obj Original Seurat object. genes Character vector genes plot. ... Additional arguments passed methods. n_bins Integer. Number bins (default 100). ordering_method Character. "peak" (sort max time) "cluster". span Numeric. smoothing parameter (alpha) LOESS smoothing across Tocky Time bins. Default 0.5. scale_rows Logical. Whether perform row-wise Z-score scaling smoothed expression matrix. Default TRUE.

what: Project New ScRNA-seq Data into an Established Canonical Tocky Space — mProjectCanonicalTocky
title: Project New ScRNA-seq Data into an Established Canonical Tocky Space — mProjectCanonicalTocky
text: Performs Redundancy Analysis (RDA) new expression matrix (e.g., human orthologs) using exact explanatory variable matrix (Z) internal mappings reference Tocky model (e.g., mouse).

code: mProjectCanonicalTocky(X_mat, ref_obj, seurat_obj, ...)  # S4 method for class 'Matrix' mProjectCanonicalTocky(X_mat, ref_obj, seurat_obj, scale_Z = TRUE)

title: Project New ScRNA-seq Data into an Established Canonical Tocky Space — mProjectCanonicalTocky
text: X_mat Matrix (dense sparse) expression data new dataset. ref_obj reference mCanonicalTockyObj. seurat_obj Seurat object corresponding cells X_mat. ... Additional arguments passed methods. scale_Z Logical. Whether scale Z matrix (default TRUE).

title: Project New ScRNA-seq Data into an Established Canonical Tocky Space — mProjectCanonicalTocky
text: mCanonicalTockyObj containing projected cells.

what: Run TradeSeq Differential Dynamics Analysis (Optimized for 2 Lineages) — mRunTradeSeqTocky
title: Run TradeSeq Differential Dynamics Analysis (Optimized for 2 Lineages) — mRunTradeSeqTocky
text: Evaluates differential gene expression across exactly two developmental tubes. Employs aggressive proportional thresholding drop uninformative genes, bypassing severe RAM processing bottlenecks tradeSeq.

title: Run TradeSeq Differential Dynamics Analysis (Optimized for 2 Lineages) — mRunTradeSeqTocky
code: mRunTradeSeqTocky(object, seurat_obj, ...)  # S4 method for class 'mCanonicalTockyObj' mRunTradeSeqTocky(   object,   seurat_obj,   tubes = NULL,   min_pct = 0.05,   n_knots = 5,   n_cores = 1,   p_adjust_method = "fdr" )

title: Run TradeSeq Differential Dynamics Analysis (Optimized for 2 Lineages) — mRunTradeSeqTocky
text: object mCanonicalTockyObj. seurat_obj Seurat object fetch counts . ... Additional arguments passed methods. tubes Character vector exactly two genes defining tubes compare (e.g., c("Cd4", "Cd8a")). NULL, auto-detects exactly two exist. min_pct Numeric. Minimum fraction cells gene must expressed (default 0.05, .e., 5%). n_knots Integer. Number knots GAM (default 5). n_cores Integer. Number cores parallel processing (default 1). p_adjust_method Character. Correction method: "fdr" (default), "bonferroni", "holm", etc.

what: Plot Gene Dynamics Trends Along Trajectory Tubes — plotLineageGeneDynamics
title: Plot Gene Dynamics Trends Along Trajectory Tubes — plotLineageGeneDynamics
text: Generates high-clarity plot showing smoothed maturation trends specific genes. Automatically maps cells respective overlapping biological tubes (e.g., Tube_Cd4, Tube_Cd8a) plots expression dynamics across Tocky Time. Cells dual identities properly contribute shared origins multiple trajectories.

title: Plot Gene Dynamics Trends Along Trajectory Tubes — plotLineageGeneDynamics
